title: x-tra Spicy Neapolitan Apricots Cassata Siciliana
description: A unique Neapolitan dessert featuring dried apricots, spicy kick, and traditional Sicilian cassata form.
instructions: In a small bowl, soften the gelatin in 120ml of cold water for 5 minutes.
Heat the gelatin mixture in a saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally, until dissolved.
In a blender, puree the apricots with 100g of the honey until smooth.
In a separate blender, blend the almond paste, remaining 50g of honey, sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the apricot puree, almond paste mixture, and softened gelatin. Mix until well combined.
Stir in the candied ginger, eggs, and chili flakes.
Pour the mixture into a 1.5L sous-vide container and seal.
Cook in a water bath at 82°C for 2 hours.
After cooking, allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
Stir in the pistachios and apricot jam.
Pour the mixture into a 20cm x 10cm loaf pan lined with parchment paper.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight to set.
Unmold the cassata and slice into thick rounds.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional pistachios if desired.
